title: Renode emulation for nRF52840 Meshtastic boards
description: Add Renode board definitions for nRF52840-based Meshtastic boards (T-Echo, RAK4631). Enables full firmware testing without hardware. Requires nRF52840 platform + SX126x peripheral model or LichenSubGHz bridge. Software-only: Renode .repl files, C# peripherals, DTS overlays.
notes: Commit: e3cb5843b - Enabled easyDMA:true on SPI1 in nrf52840_lichen.repl to fix nrfx_spim timeout and SX1262 RX (per validation memory). T-Echo Renode now has better radio support. Additional RX/CS fixes in r7h4.6 child.
close_reason: easyDMA enabled for SX1262 SPI (commit e3cb5843b). Renode nRF52840 support improved.
